subcodes.first_line: My God, My God! Thou seest me, under all conditions, set in motion at Thy behest, and savoring Thy blessings and Thine inward and outward bounties
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی فیکل الاحوال متحرکا بامرک و متنعما بالائک و نعمائک من ظاهرها
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @love of God
